title: Fix OMR usage cap fallback gap

tasks.title: Rewrite SessionErrorLike + classifySessionError for real {name, data:{...}} shape
tasks.verification: RED: 4 nested-shape tests failed against old flat classifier (data.statusCode/data.message/data.responseBody not extracted). GREEN: SessionErrorLike rewritten to {name, data:{...}} matching @opencode-ai/sdk EventSessionError union; classifier reads data.statusCode/message/responseBody with retry-pattern scan on responseBody. Existing 11 flat-shape detection.test.ts fixtures migrated to nested. All 22 detection tests pass; full plugin suite 95/95 pass; tsc clean. AC1 (429 nested) + AC2 (insufficient_quota responseBody) covered.

tasks.title: Add usage-cap patterns to retryPatterns[] (above last-resort)
tasks.verification: RED: 5 pattern tests failed (insufficient_quota literal, usage limit reached, generic usage limit/cap phrasing, 5-hour regression guard). GREEN: added 4 patterns under Quota exhaustion section above the \\bretrying\\b last-resort: insufficient_quota literal, "usage limit reached", generic usage[ _-](limit|cap|maxed|exceeded), free[_ ]usage exceeded/exhausted. Full plugin suite 101/101 pass; tsc clean. AC5 + AC6 covered. "5 hour" does not falsely match 5xx server-error pattern (verified by dedicated regression test).

tasks.title: Wire structural action.reason in handleEvent session.status case
tasks.verification: RED: 2 tests failed (account_rate_limit + free_tier_limit with non-matching message text). GREEN: handleEvent session.status now reads status.action.reason structurally first (P33) — account_rate_limit→rate_limit, free_tier_limit→quota_exhausted, future reasons fall through to text patterns. EventInputShape updated for nested error {name,data:{}} + status.action typing. isEventInputShape narrowing extended. Absorbed T4: migrated 3 flat-shape session.error fixtures in plugin.test.ts (lines 141, 197, 221) to nested {name, data:{statusCode, isRetryable}}. Full plugin suite 105/105 pass; tsc clean; reason="rate_limit" logged (was "unknown" before migration — confirms classifier now reads data correctly end-to-end). AC3 + AC4 + AC7 covered.

tasks.title: Migrate existing session.error test fixtures from flat to nested shape

contract_refs.not_applicable_reason: Build/deploy task; no TDD applicable. Verification is dist file equality + full test suite green.

tasks.verification: Build: bun run build → ESM dist/index.js 22.90 KB + DTS dist/index.d.ts 145B (success). Synced to ~/.local/share/opencode-model-routing/plugin/dist/ — diff clean. Deployed bundle contains new pattern /\\busage[ _-]?(limit|cap|maxed|exceeded)s?(?![a-z])/ (grep-verified). Pattern fix during log-coverage check: changed trailing \\b to (?![a-z]) so ChatGPT Pro's snake-case type literal "usage_limit_reached" matches — \\b after "limit" required non-word char but "_" is a word char. Added optional 's' for plural form. Added regression tests using verbatim user-observed strings from ~/.local/share/opencode/log/2026-05-23T180338.log @ 18:04:02 ses_1a9fdfb70ffeExYV11DljnFqU0: (1) message "The usage limit has been reached" → quota_exhausted; (2) responseBody type literal {"type":"usage_limit_reached"} → quota_exhausted; (3) full ChatGPT Pro 429 APIError payload with statusCode → rate_limit. Final suite: 109/109 pass, tsc clean. AC8 satisfied.

discovery.approval_evidence: Schema mismatch (Bug A) + structural-action.reason + pattern coverage (Bug B) confirmed via sst/opencode SDK type defs.

design.approval_evidence: Design validated by adv-researcher: APPROVE. Refinements absorbed: (1) drop SessionErrorLike flat back-compat, rewrite tests to real {name,data:{}} shape; (2) insert new patterns above \\bretrying\\b last-resort; (3) action.reason structural-first mapping; (4) responseBody JSON scan retained.

execution.approval_evidence: All tasks done or cancelled-with-approval. Final loop: 109/109 plugin tests, Go tests pass (cmd/omr + internal/config + internal/tui), tsc clean, build success, schema-contract-check PASS. Deployed plugin synced to ~/.local/share/opencode-model-routing/plugin/dist/.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User replied 'accept' to Tier A inline acceptance prompt. Contract review matrix: 19/19 required rows pass/respected, 0 failures.

items.text: `classifySessionError({ name: "APIError", data: { statusCode: 429, message: "Quota exceeded..." } })` returns `"rate_limit"`.
`classifySessionError({ name: "APIError", data: { message: "Quota exceeded.", isRetryable: false, responseBody: '{"error":{"code":"insufficient_quota"}}' } })` returns `"quota_exhausted"`.
`handleEvent` on `session.status` retry with `action.reason: "account_rate_limit"` triggers fallback with `reason: "rate_limit"` — no reliance on message text.
`handleEvent` on `session.status` retry with `action.reason: "free_tier_limit"` triggers fallback with `reason: "quota_exhausted"`.
`classifyRetryStatusText("5 hour usage limit reached. It will reset in 5 hours 23 minutes...")` returns `"quota_exhausted"` (pattern fallback).
`classifyRetryStatusText("Free usage exceeded, subscribe to Go")` returns `"quota_exhausted"`.
All other existing classifications in `plugin/test/detection.test.ts` still pass after fixture migration to real shapes.
Plugin rebuilt (`bun run build`) + full test suite green; deployed plugin at `~/.local/share/opencode-model-routing/plugin/dist/` updated to match.
Do NOT modify OpenCode core / upstream event emission.
Do NOT add streaming chat-text scanning — confirmed unnecessary.
Do NOT add retry/backoff logic to OMR.
Keep patterns anchored (use `\b` word boundaries) to avoid false positives.
Structural classification (action.reason) MUST take precedence over text patterns (P33).
New patterns inserted before the `\bretrying\b` last-resort entry in retryPatterns[].
Adding new providers or chain features.
ContextOverflowError handling (OpenCode marks it non-retryable; fallback doesn't help).

rows.evidence: test/detection.test.ts:8 'APIError data.statusCode 429 → rate_limit' passes; classifier.ts:50-55 returns rate_limit on data.statusCode === 429
test/detection.test.ts:73 'APIError data.responseBody insufficient_quota JSON → quota_exhausted' passes via responseBody scan fallback in classifier.ts:71-77
test/plugin.test.ts:271 'account_rate_limit → fallback fires (rate_limit)' passes; plugin-internal.ts handleEvent reads status.action.reason structurally first
test/plugin.test.ts:298 'free_tier_limit → fallback fires (quota_exhausted)' passes; same code path as AC3
test/detection.test.ts:140 'OpenCode Go usage-limit retry → quota_exhausted' passes; matches via patterns.ts 'usage[ _-]?(limit|cap|maxed|exceeded)s?(?![a-z])'
test/detection.test.ts:149 'Free usage exceeded (Go upsell) → quota_exhausted' passes; matches via patterns.ts 'free[_ ]?usage[_ ]?(exceeded|exhausted)'
Full suite 110/110 pass; all 11 pre-existing flat-shape fixtures migrated to nested {name, data:{}} in detection.test.ts + plugin.test.ts with original classifications preserved
bun run build success (22.9KB dist/index.js); copied to ~/.local/share/opencode-model-routing/plugin/dist/; diff -q clean; deployed bundle contains new regex (grep-verified) + DRY refactor
git diff main..HEAD shows zero changes outside plugin/ subtree; no OpenCode core files touched
No new chat-text scanning added; classifier only scans event payloads (session.error.data, session.status retry text) — not chat message parts
No retry/backoff logic added; only classification + attemptFallback dispatch, both pre-existing

All new patterns use \b prefix; usage[ _-]?(...) uses (?![a-z]) suffix instead of \b — explicit deviation documented in patterns.ts:33-35 with rationale (\b would fail on snake_case usage_limit_reached because '_' is a word char). All other patterns retain \b on both ends.

plugin-internal.ts handleEvent session.status case: structural status.action.reason mapping runs BEFORE classifyRetryStatusText text fallback (lines verified by test/plugin.test.ts:271-356 four tests)
All 4 new quota patterns inserted under '// Quota exhaustion' section at patterns.ts lines 29-37; \bretrying\b last-resort remains as final entry
Out-of-scope: no OpenCode upstream changes; respected
Out-of-scope: no agent config changes; respected

acceptanceCriteria: `classifySessionError({ name: "APIError", data: { statusCode: 429, message: "Quota exceeded..." } })` returns `"rate_limit"`.
`classifySessionError({ name: "APIError", data: { message: "Quota exceeded.", isRetryable: false, responseBody: '{"error":{"code":"insufficient_quota"}}' } })` returns `"quota_exhausted"`.
`handleEvent` on `session.status` retry with `action.reason: "account_rate_limit"` triggers fallback with `reason: "rate_limit"` — no reliance on message text.
`handleEvent` on `session.status` retry with `action.reason: "free_tier_limit"` triggers fallback with `reason: "quota_exhausted"`.
`classifyRetryStatusText("5 hour usage limit reached. It will reset in 5 hours 23 minutes...")` returns `"quota_exhausted"` (pattern fallback).
`classifyRetryStatusText("Free usage exceeded, subscribe to Go")` returns `"quota_exhausted"`.
All other existing classifications in `plugin/test/detection.test.ts` still pass after fixture migration to real shapes.
